description: Legal document in the hand of Yosef b. Shemuel b. Seʿadya ha-Levi. Dating: Mentions Tishrei 1520 Seleucid, which is 1208 CE. Abū l-ʿIzz acknowledges receipt of 1/6 of the rent of a house in the Masjid al-Qubba quarter from Abū l-Baqāʾ b. Yefet ha-Kohen (known as paqid ha-soḥarim). And permits demolition and construction from the wall of the wind catcher (bādhanj). Signed by Ḥalfon b. Elʿazar ha-Kohen. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב יד יוסף בן שמואל בן סעדיה הלוי; תשרי 1520 שטרות = 1208 לספירה; אבו אל-עז מאשר קבלת 1/6 שכר שכירות
